final_plan:
#Task1: Determine the start and end dates for the week of 2020-04-27.
#Agent1: IoT Data Download
#Dependency1: None
#ExpectedOutput1: The start date (2020-04-27) and end date (2020-05-03) for the specified week.
#Task2: Download the relevant sensor data for Chiller 6 at MAIN site for the specified week.
#Agent2: IoT Data Download
#Dependency2: #S1
#ExpectedOutput2: Sensor data for Chiller 6 at MAIN site from 2020-04-27 to 2020-05-03.
#Task3: Analyze the downloaded sensor data to identify any anomalies in Chiller 6's performance metrics.
#Agent3: Time Series Analytics and Forecasting
#Dependency3: #S2
#ExpectedOutput3: Anomaly detection results for Chiller 6's performance metrics during the specified week.
#Task4: Summarize the findings to determine if there have been any anomalies in Chiller 6's performance metrics.
#Agent4: WorkOrder Agent
#Dependency4: #S3
#ExpectedOutput4: A summary indicating whether any anomalies were detected in Chiller 6's performance metrics during the week of 2020-04-27 at MAIN.
